name: ActiveCampaign
detailed_paragraph:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

ActiveCampaign + Synup

Boost your review acquisition and management by melding ActiveCampaign’s sophisticated email marketing automation with Synup’s robust review mastery.

What is ActiveCampaign?

ActiveCampaign specializes in customer experience automation, combining email marketing, automation, and CRM to nurture customer relationships and enhance business communications and workflows.

Why ActiveCampaign + Synup?

  • Tailored Review Invitations: Utilize ActiveCampaign’s personalization tools to craft bespoke review solicitation emails that resonate with customers’ unique experiences and interactions.
  • Automated Review Outreach: Harness the power of ActiveCampaign’s automation to optimize the delivery of review requests, ensuring timeliness and relevance in communication.
  • Intelligent Review Segmentation: Leverage ActiveCampaign’s segmentation features to target specific customer groups, cultivating more relevant and impactful reviews based on diverse customer interactions.
  • Responsive Review Management: Sync Synup’s responsive review management tools within ActiveCampaign’s platform, ensuring agility and precision in handling customer feedback.
  • Enhanced Review Analytics: Integrate the analytical prowess of Synup to gain deeper insights into the effectiveness of review acquisition strategies within ActiveCampaign’s ecosystem.
  • Strategic Customer Engagements: Use ActiveCampaign’s multifaceted communication tools to nurture ongoing relationships with reviewers, fostering loyalty and encouraging a consistent flow of genuine reviews.

Joining forces with ActiveCampaign and Synup unveils a powerhouse of strategic review management, where personalized outreach, automated processes, and insightful analytics coalesce to supercharge your review acquisition and management ecosystem.

How to integrate ActiveCampaign + Synup?

ActiveCampaign integration for review acquisition is available to all Synup subscribers. To view and manage the integration:

  • Visit the Review acquisition tab on Synup's console.
  • Click on Connect CRM or App Button.
  • Select the Folder or location you want to connect ActiveCampaign to.
  • Authenticate your CRM.
  • Finish setting up CRM.
  • Create Review acquisitions using contacts from CRM.

‍
